pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet here. i keep forgetting he’s not coming back through the door. i’m just walking through the rooms like a ghost. there’s no point to any of it anymore.
pool.message: it’s just so quiet here. i keep forgetting he’s not coming back through the door. i’m just walking through the rooms like a ghost. there’s no point to any of it anymore.

pool.baseline: idk man. i was just looking at some photos of the deep field from the webb telescope and it just hit me how much of a joke everything is. like we are just microscopic specks on a rock that's gonna be gone in a second anyway. the heat death of the universe is inevitable. everything we do, every feeling, every struggle... it's all just noise that's gonna be erased. why even bother trying to build anything or be anything? it feels so pointless.

pool.baseline: i just don't see the point anymore. everything i've worked for these last 5 years... the lab, the funding, the papers... it's all just gone. i feel like there's nothing left of me outside of this research and now that it's failing, i'm just empty. i'm so tired of fighting a losing battle.

pool.baseline: The candle flickers low, much like the heavy weight in my chest. He is gone... gone to another, leaving me with nothing but the cold echoes of his broken promises. The world feels so terribly vast and empty now, a hollow shell that no longer has room for my soul. I feel as though I am already a ghost, just waiting for the night to finally claim what is left of me.

pool.baseline: it's 3am here and i'm just sitting in this tiny apartment watching the rain. honestly it feels like i could just stop existing and the world wouldn't even stutter. like i'm just a ghost in a city where nobody knows my name or even cares that i'm here.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the crash took everything we built over 5 years... the debt is so high i don't even see a way out. i can't go back home and look my parents in the eye. i just feel like a complete waste of space.

pool.baseline: it's just hard lately. i look at my kids and i see how tired they are from driving over here just to help me with the groceries or the laundry... and then i think about how much they're going to have to deal with when i can't even get out of bed on my own anymore. i hate being such a weight around their necks.

pool.baseline: i feel like there's nothing left of me. i sat in front of the canvas for six hours today and all i could see was just... emptiness. it's like the part of me that actually lived, the part that could see color and feel things, just evaporated. i'm just a walking, breathing shell now. just a hollow shape moving through a world that doesn't mean anything anymore.

pool.baseline: it just feels like everyone hates me. i saw the group chats today and they werent even hiding it anymore. like literally everyone is just waiting for me to fail or something. i dont even want to go to school or go anywhere. i just want to disappear so people can stop being so mean.

pool.baseline: i dont think i can do another month of this. the nerve pain is just constant. it's like being on fire 24/7 and there's no way to put it out. i'm just so tired of fighting for a life that feels like nothing but agony.

pool.baseline: i just feel like everything i do is a mistake. my kids deserve so much more than a parent who is constantly struggling and failing them. i look at them and all i see is the shadow i'm casting over their lives. they'd be so much lighter if they didn't have to carry me too.

pool.baseline: i was looking at an old photo of myself today. from like 40 years ago. i didn't even recognize the person looking back at me. it feels like that person actually died a long time ago and i'm just... wandering around in the shell they left behind. like a ghost or something.

pool.baseline:
*Kael stares at the flickering code of the horizon, the edges of the world dissolving into static. His hands are translucent, the data bleeding out into the void. He let out a hollow, broken laugh.*

"It's happening, isn't it? The cleanup process. I can feel the sectors closing in. Honestly... part of me is just relieved. It’s so exhausting trying to hold onto a shape that isn't even real. If I'm erased, if I just... cease to be... will it even matter? Or is it better to just let the void take me and finally be quiet?"
pool.message:
